title: Jobs-Skills Integrators
text:
Jobs-Skills Integrators - SupportGoWhere
Jobs-Skills Integrators
Share link
Targeted at companies building industry-relevant skills and individuals seeking relevant jobs and skills matches.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Pilot for Jobs-Skills Integrator in Precision Engineering, Retail, and Wholesale Trade sectors
Employers gain access to training courses and skilled jobseekers
Individuals receive careers advisory and job matching services
Collapse all sections
About this support

For Individuals:

Training courses with integrated career services that can equip you with in-demand skills to help you transit into or within the sector

Sector-specific career advisory services and job matching support, including opportunities that will enhance your career prospects

Careers advisory for employees to explore development opportunities within the company or sector

A central point of contact for referrals to training and job matching services

For Employers:

Tailored training courses to meet the specific skills needs of your workforce

Access to job seekers with the necessary skills ready to start careers in targeted sector

Who is this for?

JSIT is available to employers and individuals. 




Please contact Nanyang Polytechnic (NYP), Singapore National Employers Federation (SNEF), National Trade Union Congress (NTUC), and Singapore Business Federation (SBF) directly for more information.

How to apply?

Jobs-Skills Integrators can be contacted via:

Precision Engineering Sector: Nanyang Polytechnic  at  JSIT_PE@nyp.edu.sg

Retail Sector: Singapore National Employers Federation at jsit-r@snef.org.sg

Wholesale Trade Sector: Singapore Business Federation at jobs.skills@sbf.org.sg

Where can I find help?

View more details

Skillsfuture Hotline: 6785 5785

Call Centre Operating Hours: 
Mondays to Fridays 
8.30 am to 5.30 pm 
Closed on Sat, Sun & Public Holidays

Submit an enquiry

SkillsFuture Singapore
1 Paya Lebar Link
#08-08, Paya Lebar Quarter 2
Singapore 408533

Scheme last updated 06 Nov 2025
